name_cn:
Black lambskin embroidered checkered pattern
CASSANDRE _Chain bag, a super practical mini bag. Italian imported original lambskin, full leather interior and exterior. Exquisite handcrafted stitching with a square check pattern, classic metal logo adds personality, and a flap design ensures security. The shoulder strap is detachable. The bag features ten card slots, a bill compartment, two dividers, and a zippered interior pocket to hold everything!
Model: 743364
Dimensions: 23x14x3cm
Strap Length: 47cm
